statement.markdown:
## Accessible Drag Drop

Create a simple drag and drop interface with HTML, CSS and JavaScript that allows users to reorder items.

### Requirements

1. Use the `draggable` attribute on the item elements.
2. Use the `dropzone` attribute on the target element.
3. Implement a basic reordering functionality with drag-and-drop.
4. Ensure accessibility by providing a clear visual indication when an item is being dragged.
5. Ensure accessibility by providing a clear auditory indication when an item is dropped.
6. Ensure accessibility by providing a clear visual indication when an item is dropped.
7. Make sure it is accessible using only a keyboard.
8. Use a library like Tailwind CSS for styling.
9. Ensure the layout adapts to different screen sizes and devices.
10. Implement a feature to disable drag and drop functionality when the user is in the focus mode.
